data.description:
Dogecoin price recorded a slump of more than 7% today amid a broader crypto market selloff. The meme coin sector was one of the top laggards in the digital assets space, as evidenced by the performance of the top players in the segment.

data.title: The White House agrees Musk has the ‘right to speak for his companies’
data.description:
The White House said Thursday that Elon Musk is entitled to speak on behalf of his companies against the backdrop of his feud with President Donald Trump. The comment came just days after Musk exited his role leading the Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) and began lobbying policymakers against the administration’s signature budget and tax […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/white-house-agrees-musk-defend-his-companies/

data.title: Is Ethereum Back In Business? Morningstar Candlestick Pattern Tells A Story
data.description:
Ethereum has so far underperformed in this market cycle but looks ready to mount a parabolic rally based on analysts’ predictions. Crypto analyst Crypto Bullet recently highlighted a bullish pattern on ETH’s chart, which provides a bullish outlook for the altcoin. Ethereum Eyes $3,300 As Morningstar Candle Pattern Forms In an X post, Crypto Bullet predicted that Ethereum could rally to $3,300 as a Morningstar Candle pattern forms for the largest altcoin by market cap. This came as he highlighted the bullish monthly close for ETH and alluded to the monthly chart printing this bullish pattern
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/ethereum/ethereum-back-in-business/

data.title: Tigran Gambaryan formally resigns from Binance following return to US

Following the announcement, Polygon’s POL token rose 2. 2% and is trading at $0. 2144. Polymarket has. . .

data.title: New Federal Reserve Vice Chair Confirmation Represents a ‘Turning Point’ for Crypto, Says Senator Lummis
data.description:
U. S. Senator Cynthia Lummis (R-WY) is optimistic that the confirmation of Michelle “Miki” Bowman as Vice Chairman for Supervision of the Federal Reserve Board will transform the crypto market
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/06/06/new-federal-reserve-vice-chair-confirmation-represents-a-turning-point-for-crypto-says-senator-lummis/

data.title: Could BlackRock’s $34.7M Ethereum Buy Signal a Bullish Shift for ETH Price?
data.description:
The cryptocurrency market has seen a surge in institutional interest in recent months, with BlackRock making notable moves towards Ethereum. This move has sparked a bullish outlook for Ethereum (eth) price. On June 5, BlackRock purchased $34. 7 million worth of Ethereum (ETH), marking a significant shift in institutional investment patterns
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/06/06/could-blackrocks-34-7m-ethereum-buy-signal-a-bullish-shift-for-eth-price/

data.title: HIVE Digital Capacity Crosses 10 EH/s in May, Aims to More Than Double That by Year-End
data.description:
Bitcoin miner HIVE Digital Technologies (HIVE) has surpassed 10 exahash per second (EH/s) in hashrate capacity, a 58% increase from April, driven by the launch of a 100-megawatt hydro-powered site in Paraguay. The company said in a press release on Friday that it's on track to reach 25 EH/s by the end of 2025.The firm mined 139 bitcoin in May, or an average rate of 4.5 BTC per day
source: https://www.coindesk.com/markets/2025/06/06/hive-digital-capacity-crosses-10-ehs-in-may-aims-to-more-than-double-that-by-year-end

data.title: Has Bitcoin been captured by politics and institutions?
